title: AI Models Configuration
description: Manage and switch between different AI model providers, supporting Claude, Kimi, Zhipu, and more
noProviders: No models configured yet. Choose one from above to get started

dialog.description: Configure AI model's API key and related parameters
dialog.subscriptionModeDesc: Login using Claude subscription (via claude login)
dialog.subscriptionInfo: Use Claude Pro/Max subscription account. First run
dialog.roleMappingDesc: Maps opus/sonnet/haiku/fable to this provider's models (sets ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_*_MODEL when active)
dialog.openaiWarning: OpenAI format can't be used by Claude Code directly — it needs a gateway proxy (e.g. claude-code-router) translating to Anthropic; point Base URL at the gateway.
dialog.restartHint: Switching takes effect after you restart your Claude Code session (env is read at launch).
